title: codonopsis henryi
intro: Codonopsis henryi, also known as the 'Henry's balmony', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. Traditionally, the roots of this plant have been used in Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Codonopsis henryi include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve digestion. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
